---
title: '2014/05/26 Journal Memorial Day'
date: '2014-05-26T13:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6248912670160760311'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/20140526-journal-memorial-day.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>It's Memorial Day. I woke up to kids yelling at each other. So I rolled over and went back to sleep.</p>
<p>I promised them pancakes today, so I'll go do that.</p>
<p>I don't know what other plans are for today. Probably nothing since we're still broke.</p>
<p>The lawn probably needs to be done.</p>
<p>.<u>dw</u></p>
